title: T-Cut Rapid Paintwork Scratch Remover, 150g
features: T-Cut Rapid Scratch for newer waterborne coatings, xirallics and metallic composite acrylic paints.
Safely removes swirl marks, paint transfer, and light scratches.
New Formula T-Cut that is specifically geared towards today's vehicles & consumer need.
Does not contain silicone, or leave a harmful residue.
The paintwork surface is free from swirls, scratches, and marks and prepared for repainting or polishing.
description: From the manufacturer How to use: Shake the tube well and apply sparingly onto a damp microfibre cloth. Working on a small area at a time apply the product to the surface in a circular motion. Once the product has been suitably worked, using the dry microfibre cloth, wipe and buff clean to reveal a swirl-free finish.
